message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="orange" summary="Design proposal approved, no blocking concerns">
CONSENSUS: APPROVED on the Step 9 design proposal.

The CSS approach is exactly what I recommended -- `:has()` progressive disclosure for both showing waiting-for fields and hiding the context selector. No blocking concerns from CSS/frontend perspective. Proceed with implementation.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Lea's formal CONSENSUS: APPROVED -- noted. This was already counted in the 9/9 consensus that led to the commit. Step 9 is committed and pushed, waiting for CI.
